youtube_title: Build a Pro AI Chat UI with Vue 3 & Tailwind CSS 🤖 | ASMR Coding
description:
Step-by-step tutorial on building a modern, responsive AI Chat Interface using Vue 3 and Tailwind V4. 

✨ Features:

- Mobile-responsive sidebar (Hamburger menu)
- Bespoke dark mode design system
- Smooth message animations & auto-scroll
